title: Flipcommons data patch
description: A small, source-attributed set of catalog claims and/or citation-source roots. Filename is NNNN-slug.yaml; the stem is the patch id. Authoritative validation happens in flipcommons' ingest_patches; this schema gives editors and CI an early structural check.

anyOf.description: A patch must carry a non-empty 'claims' or 'sources'.

note.description: Reason for the change; becomes a ChangeSet note. Shared by a flat entry and each `changesets:` item.

cite.description: External evidence, either as scheme:identifier (ipdb:4443, opdb:GRhX5) or an http(s):// URL (a standalone or domain-nested web source). Capped at 2000 chars to mirror the link column. A URL matching a known scheme's record pattern is rejected by ingest_patches in favor of the scheme:identifier form. Attaches a citation to this entry's authored field claims (not create-owned slug/status).

propertyNames.description: A numeric handle, quoted as a string ('1'). Ephemeral authoring label wiring a [[cite:N]] marker to its source; minted to a durable citation at apply time.

cites.description: Inline-citation map declaring the NEW footnotes referenced from a markdown field (e.g. description) via [[cite:N]] markers. Each key is a numeric handle quoted as a string ('1'); each value is a cite-spec in the same grammar as 'cite:' — scheme:identifier, an http(s):// URL, or a { url, archive } map of URLs. Existing-footnote markers ([[cite:<slug>]]) self-resolve and take no entry here. Marker<->map correspondence and cite resolution are validated authoritatively by ingest_patches.

retract.description: Scalar/FK field names whose claim from this patch's source should be removed. Not valid with create.

remove.description: Relationship members to remove: a mapping of relationship namespace to a list of member values — FK public_ids (e.g. {location: [germany]}) or bare strings for aliases/abbreviations (e.g. {manufacturer_alias: [Stern Inc]}).

attribution.description: Source slug; must already exist in flipcommons. A patch attributes to the source the fact came from (e.g. flip-museum, flipcommons-catalog, ipdb, opdb) and supersedes or retracts that source's own claim.

description.description: Freeform rationale (the why). Copied to the IngestRun note.

claims.description: Ordered list of operations; each entry is a single-key mapping (entity ref -> fields). An entry may group several changesets on one record under a single header via `changesets:` (the ref declared once).

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*\\.[a-z0-9][a-z0-9/-]*$.description: Fields to assert on this entity. Reserved keys (directives, not claim fields): create, delete, expect, retract, remove, note, cite, cites, changesets.

allOf.description: create is exclusive with delete and the edit-only directives (retract/remove).
delete is footprint-exclusive — no retract/remove/changesets companions.

create.description: Opt-in to create the entity when its public_id does not resolve.

delete.description: Soft-delete the entity (status -> deleted) through the delete planner. Not valid with create.

expect.description: Legacy drift guard, now accepted-but-ignored: still permitted so older patches that carry it validate, but it no longer guards anything. Omit it in new patches.

changesets.description: Companion changesets on the same record. Each item is edit-shaped (note/cite/cites/retract/remove + authored fields) and becomes its own ChangeSet, inheriting the header's ref. Lifecycle (create/delete) lives on the header, not here.

sources.description: Citation-source roots to upsert (the `sources:` block) — books, magazines or websites that later `cite:` entries hang under. Each is flat (no nested children); create child sources via `cite:` on a claim. Field values are validated authoritatively against the model in ingest_patches.

identifier_key.description: Marks a scheme root whose children carry structured identifiers (ipdb/opdb). Root web sources only.

links.description: URLs where a reader can inspect the source. A root needs a 'homepage' link for domain-based URL recognition.
